# Rigetti Newsroom
Latest press, blogs, and company news
![Lo res rigetti fremont 10 24 25 drew bird 203](https://www.rigetti.com/assets/i/uploads/2416232/lo-res-rigetti-fremont-10-24-25-drew-bird-203_5462c9debf066956bb5d7fe49214880f.JPG)
### Rigetti announces order for a 108-qubit quantum computer from India’s Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)
Rigetti Computing India P L, a wholly owned subsidiary of Rigetti Computing, Inc. today announced that it has received an $8.4 million purchase order to deliver a 108-qubit quantum computer to the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), India’s premier R&D organization of the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.
[Learn More](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/01/20/3221654/0/en/Rigetti-Announces-Order-for-a-108-Qubit-Quantum-Computer-from-India-s-Centre-for-Development-of-Advanced-Computing-C-DAC.html)
Filter by:
Category Blog Company News Press
Sort by: Newest | [Oldest](https://www.rigetti.com/rigetti-computing-news/p2)
Clear all filters
25.03.26
### Rigetti Computing intends to invest $100 million in UK to accelerate quantum computing development
Rigetti’s investment will go towards deploying a quantum computing system in the UK with over 1,000 qubits in the next 3 to 4 years. This will mark the Company’s first major investment outside of the US.
  

_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/03/25/3262574/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-Intends-to-Invest-100-Million-in-UK-to-Accelerate-Quantum-Computing-Development.html)
17.03.26
### Breaking the size barrier in quantum optimization
Introducing self-consistent mean-field quantum approximate optimization — a framework inspired by the physics of magnets that enables current hardware to solve large-scale optimization problems. Discover how we apply it to a drug design problem on our Ankaa™–3 system.
_Rigetti_ [ Learn More ](https://medium.com/rigetti/breaking-the-size-barrier-in-quantum-optimization-f2cce976f286)
13.03.26
### Zero Point Cryogenics Joins Rigetti Novera™ QPU Partner Program to Launch “QPU-Ready” Model L Fridge at APS Global Physics Summit 2026
Zero Point Cryogenics and Rigetti Computing, Inc. are proud to announce ZPC’s new affiliation with the Novera™ QPU Partner Program to streamline the deployment of high-performance quantum hardware.
_Zero Point Cryogenics_ [ Learn More ](https://www.zpcryo.com/highlights/zero-point-cryogenics-joins-rigetti-novera-qpu-partner-program-to-launch-qpu-ready-model-l-fridge-at-aps-global-physics-summit-2026/)
04.03.26
### Rigetti Computing reports fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results
Demonstrates 99.9% two-qubit gate fidelity at 28 nanosecond gate speed on prototype platform
_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/03/04/3249723/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-Reports-Fourth-Quarter-and-Full-Year-2025-Financial-Results.html)
04.03.26
### Rigetti’s new proprietary adiabatic CZ entangling gate for high-fidelity QPUs and quantum error correction
How to get a QEC-ready, 99.9% fidelity two-qubit gate by pulsing only the tunable coupler
_Rigetti_ [ Learn More ](https://medium.com/rigetti/rigettis-new-proprietary-adiabatic-cz-entangling-gate-for-high-fidelity-qpus-and-quantum-error-f56fe3caadce)
18.02.26
### Rigetti Computing to report fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results and host conference call on March 4, 2026
Rigetti announced today that it will release fourth quarter and full-year 2025 results on March 4, 2026, after market close. The Company will host a conference call to discuss its financial results and provide an update on its business operations at 5:00 pm ET the same day.
_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/18/3240165/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-to-Report-Fourth-Quarter-and-Full-Year-2025-Financial-Results-and-Host-Conference-Call-on-March-4-2026.html)
20.01.26
### Rigetti announces order for a 108-qubit quantum computer from India’s Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)
Rigetti Computing India P L, a wholly owned subsidiary of Rigetti Computing, Inc. today announced that it has received an $8.4 million purchase order to deliver a 108-qubit quantum computer to the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), India’s premier R&D organization of the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.
_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/01/20/3221654/0/en/Rigetti-Announces-Order-for-a-108-Qubit-Quantum-Computer-from-India-s-Centre-for-Development-of-Advanced-Computing-C-DAC.html)
09.01.26
### Rigetti Computing provides update on 108-qubit system
Rigetti today announced that it is revising its roadmap and adjusting the date for general availability of its 108-qubit quantum computing system, Cepheus™-1-108Q. Cepheus-1-108Q is now expected to reach general availability around the end of the first quarter of 2026.
_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/01/09/3216043/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-Provides-Update-on-108-Qubit-System.html)
05.01.26
### Rigetti Computing to participate in fireside chat at 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference
Rigetti Computing today announced that CEO Dr. Subodh Kulkarni and CFO Jeff Bertelsen will host one-on-one meetings, and that Dr. Kulkarni will participate in a fireside chat, at the 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Tuesday, January 13, 2026.
_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/01/05/3212699/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-to-Participate-in-Fireside-Chat-at-28th-Annual-Needham-Growth-Conference.html?_gl=1*dhg21t*_up*MQ..*_ga*MTM0OTM4MzIxMC4xNzY3NjI1ODcx*_ga_ERWPGTJ5X8*czE3Njc2MjU4NzAkbzEkZzAkdDE3Njc2MjU4NzAkajYwJGwwJGgw)
12.11.25
### Exact simulation of Quantum Enhanced Signature Kernels for financial data streams prediction using Amazon Braket
Empirical evidence suggests that well-chosen quantum feature maps promise to enhance the performance of Machine Learning (ML) algorithms. In this work, we harness the capabilities of the Amazon Braket SV1 on-demand state-vector simulator to experimentally test the use of quantum enhanced signature kernels up to 32 qubits to predict the mid-price using Limit Order Book (LOB) data.
_AWS blog_ [ Learn More ](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/quantum-computing/exact-simulation-of-quantum-enhanced-signature-kernels-for-financial-data-streams-prediction-using-amazon-braket/)
11.11.25
### Rigetti Computing CEO: We are about 3-4 years away from demonstrating quantum advantage
Subodh Kulkarni, Rigetti Computing CEO, joins CNBC’s ‘Money Movers’ to discuss the company’s latest quarter, how investors should think about valuing quantum stocks, and much more.  

_CBNC_ [ Learn More ](https://www.cnbc.com/video/2025/11/11/rigetti-computing-ceo-we-are-about-3-4-years-away-from-demonstrating-quantum-advantage.html)
10.11.25
### Rigetti Computing reports third quarter 2025 financial results; Provides technology roadmap updates for 2026 and 2027
Rigetti Computing, Inc. today announced its financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2025.  

_GlobeNewswire_ [ Learn More ](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/11/10/3185067/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-Reports-Third-Quarter-2025-Financial-Results-Provides-Technology-Roadmap-Updates-for-2026-and-2027.html)
